tasks.label: dev: up
args:
set -euo pipefail
scheme="$1"
port_offset="$2"
case "$port_offset" in
  ''|*[!0-9]*) echo "Unsupported dev port offset: $port_offset" >&2; exit 1 ;;
esac
case "$scheme" in
  a) frontend_base=5173 ;;
  b) frontend_base=5174 ;;
  c) frontend_base=5175 ;;
  *) echo "Unsupported UI scheme: $scheme" >&2; exit 1 ;;
esac
frontend_port=$((frontend_base + port_offset))
backend_port=$((11200 + port_offset))
subconverter_port=$((25500 + port_offset))
CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_DEV_UP_FRONTEND_PORT="$frontend_port" \
CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_DEV_UP_BACKEND_PORT="$backend_port" \
CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_DEV_UP_SUBCONVERTER_PORT="$subconverter_port" \
"${workspaceFolder}/scripts/dev-up.sh" "$scheme"

tasks.label: git: rebase UI branches onto local main
git: commit staged changes to main (no push)

inputs.description: Select the UI scheme to open in the local dev flow
Port offset for concurrent worktrees: 0 uses 25500/11200/5173-5175; 10 uses 25510/11210/5183-5185
Commit message (commits staged changes to local main, clears matching current-branch changes; does not push)
